seoTitle: How to Create Custom Reports in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Learn how to create custom reports in QuickBooks Online, from choosing data fields to saving your layout, so reporting fits your business.
intro: Standard reports don't always show exactly what you need, and building a custom report can close that gap. This guide covers how to create, customize, and save a report tailored to your business in QuickBooks Online.

steps.heading: Start from a base report
steps.body: Choose an existing report closest to what you need as your starting point for customization.

steps.heading: Adjust the data fields and columns
steps.body: Add, remove, or reorder columns so the report shows the specific data points you care about.

steps.heading: Apply filters
steps.body: Set filters for date range, customer, class, or other criteria to narrow the report to what's relevant.

steps.heading: Save the custom report
steps.body: Save your customized layout with a clear name so you can run it again without rebuilding it each time.

faq.question: Can I share a custom report with my accountant?
faq.answer: Yes, you can export the report or, depending on your access setup, allow your accountant to view saved custom reports directly.

faq.question: Will my custom report update automatically with new data?
faq.answer: Yes, a saved custom report pulls fresh data each time you run it, based on the filters you've set.

faq.question: Can I schedule a custom report to run automatically?
faq.answer: Some QuickBooks Online plans support scheduling reports to be emailed automatically on a recurring basis.

faq.question: How many custom reports can I save?
faq.answer: You can typically save multiple custom reports, which is useful if you track several different views of your data regularly.
